title: How to identify weekends with a formula
task: Flag Saturday/Sunday rows — for conditional formatting, filtering, or excluding from stats.

excel.note: Mode 2 numbers Monday=1..Sunday=7, so >5 means Sat/Sun. Use inside conditional formatting too.

explanation: WEEKDAY with mode 2 counts Monday as 1 through Sunday as 7, so any value above 5 is a weekend — July 25, 2026 is a Saturday, hence TRUE. The same expression pasted into a conditional-formatting rule shades weekend rows, and =IF(WEEKDAY(A2,2)>5,"Weekend","Weekday") labels them. Mode 2 is the trick worth remembering: the default mode numbers Sunday as 1, which makes the weekend test the clumsier OR(WEEKDAY(A2)=1,WEEKDAY(A2)=7).
